title: Add test-service-images CI job with stestr support
summary: Review of changes addressing sourcery-ai[bot] external feedback. Three issues were raised: (1) overly restrictive regex validation in verify_release_config.sh rejecting valid stestr patterns, (2) hardcoded paths preventing validation of future releases/services, (3) missing yq installation in test-service-images job. All three have been correctly addressed: the regex validator now only flags whitespace-only lines, all three test functions iterate over releases/*/test-excludes/ instead of a single hardcoded path, and an Install yq step with SHA256 checksum verification was added before the Resolve source ref step.

tests_checklist.item: verify_release_config.sh passes with parameterized test-excludes validation
Edge cases covered: absent test-excludes dirs, no .txt files, empty glob matches

code_quality_checklist.item: Follows existing code patterns (glob iteration matches verify_spdx_headers.sh)
yq install pattern matches verify-container-images.yaml exactly (same version, SHA, approach)
No dead code or unnecessary complexity
Regex loosening correctly addresses the overly-restrictive validation feedback

security_checklist.item: yq binary verified via SHA256 checksum before execution
yq version pinned (v4.45.1) to prevent supply chain drift
No secrets exposed in changed code

architecture_checklist.item: Solution is minimal — only addresses the three feedback items
Parameterized iteration is forward-compatible with new releases/services

fail_fast_checklist.item: yq install verifies checksum before making binary executable
Test functions skip gracefully when optional dirs are absent

defensive_checklist.item: Glob patterns handle no-match case with [ -f ] / [ -d ] guards
found_any flag prevents false silence when no files match

suggested_improvements: DA3 (minor): docs/reference/build-images-workflow.md test-service-images step table (lines 322-331) is missing the new 'Install yq' step inserted between Checkout and Resolve source ref. The verify-container-images section (line 1093) already documents its Install yq step — the test-service-images table should be updated to match. This is a documentation-only gap; the implementation is correct.
next_steps: Update docs/reference/build-images-workflow.md test-service-images step table to include 'Install yq' as step 2, shifting subsequent step numbers by 1
